title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
ECIL, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
